sql: SELECT 'follow_list' AS t, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(enabled) AS enabled_n FROM follow_list UNION ALL SELECT 'wallet_scores_total', COUNT(*), NULL FROM wallet_scores UNION ALL SELECT 'wallet_candidates', COUNT(*), NULL FROM wallet_candidates UNION ALL SELECT 'copy_probe_7d_events', COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT wallet_address) FROM copy_probe_events WHERE detected_at>=unixepoch()-7*86400 UNION ALL SELECT 'live_trades_closed', COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT lead_wallet) FROM copy_trades WHERE strategy_id LIKE '%live-micro%' AND status='closed'
